gpt2-medium.0-3: 🟦 Input Tokenization - Converting text to token IDs and embedding lookups
gpt2-medium.4-7: 🟩 Basic Syntax Detection - Punctuation, grammar markers, simple patterns
gpt2-medium.8-11: 🟨 Semantic Composition - Word meanings in context, compositional semantics
gpt2-medium.12-15: 🟧 Reasoning Primitives - Arithmetic operations, logic gates, constraint encoding
gpt2-medium.16-19: 🟪 Higher-Order Reasoning - Planning, multi-step inference, abstraction
gpt2-medium.20-23: 🔴 Output Formulation - Response generation, token ordering, final encoding

phi-2.0-5: 🟦 Input Processing - Token embedding and initial encoding
phi-2.6-12: 🟩 Problem Decomposition - Breaking down reasoning into steps
phi-2.13-20: 🟨 Intermediate Computation - Constraint application and intermediate reasoning
phi-2.21-30: 🟪 Advanced Reasoning - Multi-step inference and verification

gemma-2b.0-3: 🟦 Input Tokenization - Character and subword embeddings
gemma-2b.4-8: 🟩 Initial Pattern Detection - Basic syntactic and semantic patterns
gemma-2b.9-12: 🟨 Semantic Reasoning - Contextual meaning and word relationships
gemma-2b.13-17: 🟧 Advanced Operations - Complex reasoning and constraint handling

pythia-1.4b.0-5: 🟦 Input Processing - Token embedding and position encoding
pythia-1.4b.13-18: 🟨 Mid-Level Computation - Main reasoning and computation
pythia-1.4b.19-24: 🟧 Advanced Processing - Final reasoning stages and output preparation
